description: You are a simulation engineer at an autonomous security robotics company. Configure the patrol robot in Webots to match real hardware specifications by updating the 'patrol_radar' node parameters (maxRange: 50.0, horizontalFieldOfView: 2.094, maxSpeed: 30.0) and the 'obstacle_rangefinder' node parameters (width: 256, height: 128, maxRange: 10.0). Move the robot to the patrol starting corner at translation 5.0 0.1 5.0 and save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/patrol_robot_configured.wbt
